term: The Fate That Was Dealt to Him
pronunciation: /ðə feɪt ðæt wəz dɛlt tə hɪm/
englishDefinitions: The difficult or unfortunate situation that happened to him; the destiny or outcome he was given.
persianTranslation: مقدر یا سرنوشت تلخی که بر او تحمیل شد
examples: He struggled to accept the fate that was dealt to him.
The novel explores how he responds to the fate that was dealt to him.
No one should have to endure the fate that was dealt to him.
